guidance_documents.instructions: The vendor onboarding assessment is COMPLETE. Your approval is required to authorize this IT Security Tier 3 integration (EXPORT_ONLY). The vendor presents unregulated data classification with no personal data processing. Security policy compliance has been confirmed per IT Security Policy sections 5 and 12.2. Your approval is the first gate in the standard approval path (estimated 3 business days). No security followup is required. Please review and approve to unblock procurement and business owner approvals.
next_steps: Review and approve vendor onboarding for IT Security Tier 3 integration per IT Security Policy section 12.2
Confirm no additional security controls or followup required
Return approval to pipeline to unblock Procurement Director and VP+ approvals

guidance_documents.instructions: The vendor onboarding assessment is COMPLETE. Your approval is required as the second gate in the standard approval path (estimated 5 business days). The vendor is classified as Class A, Tier T2 integration; STANDARD approval pathway applies per Procurement Approval Matrix row A-T2. NDA has been confirmed as EXECUTED. No DPA is required (data classification is UNREGULATED, no EU personal data). Please review and approve to unblock the VP+ (Business Owner) final approval.
next_steps: Review vendor classification (Class A, Tier T2) and standard approval path per Procurement Approval Matrix section A-T2
Approve vendor onboarding to enable VP+ business owner sign-off

guidance_documents.instructions: The vendor onboarding assessment is COMPLETE. Your approval is the final gate in the standard approval path (estimated 5 business days). All upstream domain reviews are clear: IT Security has confirmed Tier 3 integration compliance, Legal has confirmed NDA execution (no DPA required), and Procurement has cleared the Class A, Tier T2 vendor. Please review and provide final business owner sign-off to complete onboarding authorization.
next_steps: Review completed IT Security, Legal, and Procurement approvals
Confirm business case and integration timeline alignment
Provide final business owner approval for vendor onboarding
